mnemonics: C.T.S. for MPI Performance: Check Time & Size
S.P.E.E.D. for MPI: Scalability, Parallel Efficiency, Execution time, Diagnostics
keyPoints: Execution time is the primary metric for MPI performance evaluation.
Scalability analysis (strong and weak scaling) is crucial for assessing performance on increasing numbers of processors.
Use profiling tools (e.g., TAU, Intel VTune) and tracing tools (e.g., Vampir) to identify bottlenecks like communication overhead and load imbalance.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on execution time without considering scalability and parallel efficiency.
Ignoring communication overhead and synchronization costs when analyzing performance.
Not accounting for load imbalance, where some processes are idle while others are working.
